meaning: adj.无懈可击的,无可指责的,无过失的,无可怀疑的
examples: He said all five were men of unimpeachable character.
They finally got evidence from an unimpeachable source.
Solomon Gills is in the act of seeing what time it is by the unimpeachable chronometer.
Mr Singh's unimpeachable integrity helps him brush off calls for his resignation over such affairs.
What each of these operas shares is an unimpeachable literary source with a reputation of its own.
